title: Making the internet clean again
message: I built another free, on-device blocker — Sieve. It filters out scams, phishing, gambling, crypto/MLM schemes, fake shops, and other harmful or distracting content. Same promise: no account, no tracking, everything runs locally.

firefox.message: I built another free, on-device blocker — Sieve. It filters out scams, phishing, gambling, crypto/MLM schemes, fake shops, and more harmful or distracting content. It's live on Firefox now — no account, no tracking, everything runs locally.

chrome.message: I want to make the internet clean again. So I built Sieve. It's a free, on-device blocker that filters out scams, phishing, gambling, crypto and MLM schemes, fake shops, and other harmful or distracting content. No account. No tracking. Everything runs locally. Coming soon to Chromium browsers.

edge.message: I want to make the internet clean again. So I built Sieve. Everything runs locally. Coming soon to Chromium browsers.
